final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional food photography shot of a Michelin three-star French main course — slow-cooked duck breast with truffle sauce, artfully plated.

Style/medium: professional commercial food photography, macro close-up, shallow depth of field, high color saturation
Composition: macro close-up shot, shallow depth of field, precise focus on the cross-section texture of the duck breast slices, side angle
Subject: slow-cooked French duck breast, neatly sliced with perfect golden-brown crispy skin, pink and juicy meat interior, fresh black truffle slices on top
Scene/backdrop: white bone china plate, dark marble countertop background, premium fine dining atmosphere
Lighting/mood: side lighting illuminating the dish, creating a luxurious high-end restaurant ambiance
Color palette: rich golden-brown duck skin, pink meat tones, deep green micro vegetables, purple endive leaves, white plate as neutral base, dark marble contrast
Materials/textures: crispy seared duck skin with visible texture, tender pink meat grain, glossy truffle sauce artistically brushed on plate edge, delicate micro vegetables and edible flowers
Avoid: flat lighting, overcooked gray meat, plastic-looking food, watermarks, generic stock photo aesthetic, oversaturated colors
